name: BeOne Medicines Ltd.
business: BeOne Medicines Ltd. is a global oncology company that discovers, develops, and commercializes innovative treatments for cancer. Its leading products include BRUKINSA (a BTK inhibitor for B-cell malignancies) and TEVIMBRA (an anti-PD-1 antibody for solid tumors). It also markets in-licensed oncology products from partners such as Amgen.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading global oncology company discovering and developing innovative treatments that are more accessible to cancer patients worldwide.

catalysts.event: Sonrotoclax received first global regulatory approval in China for R/R MCL and CLL/SLL
catalysts.sentence: On December 7, 2025, we announced new data on sonrotoclax, a next-generation investigational BCL2 inhibitor, demonstrating meaningful clinical benefit as monotherapy and in combination across B-cell malignancies, and in January 2026, we received the first approval of sonrotoclax for adult patients with relapsed/refractory (R/R) mantle cell lymphoma (MCL) and R/R chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL)/small lymphocytic lymphoma (SLL).

catalysts.event: FDA accepted and granted Priority Review to NDA for sonrotoclax for R/R MCL
catalysts.sentence: On November 26, 2025, we announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) accepted and granted Priority Review to a New Drug Application (NDA) for sonrotoclax for the treatment of adult patients with R/R MCL, following treatment with a Bruton's tyrosine kinase (BTK) inhibitor.

catalysts.event: Positive topline results from Phase 3 HERIZON-GEA-01 trial
catalysts.sentence: On November 17, 2025, we announced positive top-line results from the Phase 3 HERIZON-GEA-01 trial evaluating ZIIHERA (zanidatamab), a HER2-targeted bispecific antibody, in combination with chemotherapy, with or without PD-1 inhibitor TEVIMBRA (tislelizumab), as first-line treatment for HER2-positive (HER2+) locally advanced or metastatic gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma (GEA), including cancers of the stomach, gastroesophageal junction, and esophagus.

catalysts.event: Entered into Facilities Agreement for senior secured financing
catalysts.sentence: On November 13, 2025, we entered into the Facilities Agreement (the Facilities Agreement) with The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited (HSBC) and certain financial institutions listed in the Facilities Agreement as lenders.

catalysts.event: Sonrotoclax under Priority Review for potential accelerated approval in first half of 2026
catalysts.sentence: Sonrotoclax is under Priority Review by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for potential accelerated approval in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiated Phase 3 study comparing BRUKINSA plus sonrotoclax against acalabrutinib plus venetoclax in 1L CLL
catalysts.sentence: We have initiated a Phase 3 study in the first half of 2026, comparing BRUKINSA plus sonrotoclax against acalabrutinib plus venetoclax in 1L CLL.

tamClaims.claim: Global BTK inhibitor market was approximately $12 billion in 2025 and projected to be more than $15 billion in 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, global revenues for BTK inhibitors were approximately $12 billion according to company reported financials. Global revenues are projected to be more than $15 billion in 2028, according to published reports.

tamClaims.claim: Top four PD-1/PD-L1 antibody medicines had global revenues of over $50 billion in 2025; China PD-1/L1 market was approximately $4 billion in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: Globally, the top four PD-1/PD-L1 antibody medicines had revenues of over $50 billion in 2025 based on public reports. The 2025 China PD-1/L1 market (net revenue) was approximately $4 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Global CLL market is approximately $12 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: we believe we are uniquely positioned to potentially provide the best solution for all CLL patients along their treatment journey and lead a sustainable franchise in the approximately $12 billion global CLL market.
